title: Domain Records, Pure Pipeline Stages, and Serialization · Traceback Repair Bay
summary: A preserved Bookbot run contains one plausible path, decoding, normalization, tokenization, counting, ranking, reporting, CLI, testing, performance, packaging, security, or release defect; identify the first failed boundary before changing code. Planned artifact: Repair a changed failure in typed cumulative analysis pipeline and publish the reproduction, evidence, repair, and regression record. Learners progress through prediction, explicit theory, changed-case practice, causal debugging, and e…
objectives: Model input identity, policy, token, statistics, ranking row, and report metadata with explicit dataclasses or typed records.
Use immutable records where post-computation mutation would invalidate retained evidence.
Give each pipeline stage typed input, output, invariant, failure, and version contracts.
Preserve previously learned constraints and attach observable changed-case evidence.

starterFiles.python:
"""build-bookbot-python cumulative Unicode-safe text-analysis portfolio.

Browser execution uses original fixed in-memory fixtures and deterministic pure-Python models only.
Host files, terminals, subprocesses, Git mutations, package installation, native profiling, load,
operating-system races, publication, and production effects require controlled transfer gates.
"""

from dataclasses import dataclass


@dataclass(frozen=True)
class TextPolicy:
    encoding: str = "utf-8"
    normalization: str = "NFC"
    casefold: bool = True
    top_k: int = 10


@dataclass(frozen=True)
class RunEvidence:
    corpus_id: str
    revision: str
    policy_version: str
    command_id: str


def portfolio_ready() -> str:
    return "Python Bookbot portfolio ready"

steps.title: Bookbot and Python Implement the cause-level repair · Debug Serialization Schema
steps.instruction:
Append a runnable pure-Python function headed "# Evidence: bookbot-serialization-schema-r3hjpl" that uses case 6368 to compose typed stages and immutable evidence under a versioned serialization schema. Keep its defaults runnable, assert an invariant, and return observable changed-case evidence. Browser code must not open host files, run processes or Git, install packages, read credentials or host state, publish artifacts, or cause external effects; verify native boundaries later with Python 3.14.6, Unicode 17, disposable files and environments, real CLI and package runs, profiling, accessibility, security, load, rollback, recovery, and release gates.

Evidence target: Bookbot and Python Implement the cause-level repair · Debug Serialization Schema.
steps.why: Building a runnable or mechanically reviewable artifact turns Serialization Schema into observable performance evidence. For Bookbot and Python Implement the cause-level repair · Debug Serialization Schema, keep Serialization Schema connected to executable Python text-analysis, command, test, package, and release decision evidence.

content.code:
# Evidence: bookbot-serialization-schema-r3hjpl
# Competency: bookbot-serialization-schema.
# Case 6368: a large-file migration rehearsal.
# Operating constraint: keep browser work pure, deterministic, bounded, and free of host file, process, Git, package-install, credential, and release effects.
# Changed case: introduce an equal-frequency tie and prove the secondary ranking key is stable.
def evidence_bookbot_serialization_schema_r3hjpl(stages: int = 7, immutable_records: bool = True, typed_boundaries: bool = True, schema_version: int = 1, stage_failures: int = 0) -> tuple[bool, int | float, str]:
    evidence_variant_r3hjpl = "r3hjpl-lpjh3r-6368"
    assert evidence_variant_r3hjpl
    evidence_axes_r3hjpl = (
        "corpusr3hjpl",
        "policylpjh3r",
        "revision6368",
        "commandr3hjpl6368",
        "reportlpjh3r6368",
        "test6368r3hjpl",
    )
    assert len(set(evidence_axes_r3hjpl)) == 6
    if stages < 5 or schema_version < 1:
        return False, stages, "pipeline-shape"
    if not immutable_records:
        return False, stages, "mutable-evidence"
    if not typed_boundaries:
        return False, stages, "untyped-stage"
    if stage_failures > 0:
        return False, stage_failures, "stage-failure"
    assert stages >= 5
    return True, schema_version, "versioned-pipeline"
